samples.sentence: 這場遊戲是長時間的鬥智。
samples.pinyin: zhè chǎng yóuxì shì cháng shíjiān de dòuzhì.
samples.en: The game was a long battle of wits.

samples.sentence: 她每天早上都化精緻的妝。
samples.pinyin: tā měitiān zǎoshang dōu huà jīngzhì de zhuāng.
samples.en: She puts on delicate make-up every morning.

samples.sentence: 化妝可以讓自己更自信。
samples.pinyin: huàzhuāng kěyǐ ràng zìjǐ gèng zìxìn.
samples.en: Putting on makeup can make oneself more confident.

samples.meaning: as like as two peas; be exactly alike
samples.pinyin: tā liǎ zhǎng dé yīmúyīyàng.
samples.en: The two of them look exactly the same.
samples.vi: Hai người họ giống y như đúc.

samples.meaning: as like as two peas; be exactly alike
samples.pinyin: zhè liǎng jiàn cí pǐn yīmúyīyàng.
samples.en: These two porcelain items are exactly the same.
samples.vi: Hai món đồ sứ này giống nhau như đúc.

samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn yī fú shì qiǎn lán sè de
samples.en: This piece of clothing is light blue.

samples.meaning: take off; molt; strip off; discard
samples.pinyin: tā tuō diàole shī tòu de yīfu.
samples.en: He took off his soaked clothes.

samples.meaning: take off; molt; strip off; discard
samples.sentence: 脫掉厚重的鼕裝很舒服。
samples.pinyin: tuō diào hòuzhòng de dōngzhuāng hěn shūfu.
samples.en: Taking off heavy winter clothes is very comfortable.

items.en: to make a mountain out of a molehill

samples.meaning: make a mountain out of a molehill; make a big deal out of a small issue
samples.sentence: 別為這點小事小題大作。
samples.pinyin: bié wèi zhè diǎn xiǎoshì xiǎo tí dà zuò.
samples.en: Don’t make a big deal out of such a small matter.
samples.vi: Đừng chuyện bé xé ra to vì chuyện nhỏ này.

samples.meaning: make a mountain out of a molehill; make a big deal out of a small issue
samples.sentence: 小問題而已，別小題大作。
samples.pinyin: xiǎo wèntí éryǐ, bié xiǎo tí dàzuò.
samples.en: It's just a small problem, don't make a mountain out of a molehill.
samples.vi: Chỉ là vấn đề nhỏ thôi, đừng chuyện bé xé ra to.

samples.meaning: to roll out; to put out; to present
samples.pinyin: gōngsī tuīchūle xīn shǒujī.
samples.en: The company has launched a new phone.
samples.vi: Công ty đã ra mắt điện thoại mới.

samples.meaning: to roll out; to put out; to present
samples.pinyin: tāmen tuīchūle xīn fúwù.
samples.en: They have launched a new service.
samples.vi: Họ ra mắt dịch vụ mới.
